text: this starbucks is always quick and efficient the baristas are so friendly here they always make my drink perfect and if i m looking for something new they always have the perfect suggestion

make sure you order your coffee drinks non stop or to go otherwise they ll send security to ask you to leave or order more from the workers who spend their time talking about their teenage personal lives out loud and cussing non stop either that or they just judge people based off of their appearance either way not the usual starbucks customer service found elsewhere also they charge for refills regardless of your rewards status just go elsewhere

truly the best starbucks i have been to they are always so sweet and understanding in there you can tell they really care about the community with all of the programs they have going on in store they give their grounds out for free for those who compost and have a sanitary product donation drive too the store is always decorated for the season and has a pride flag year round i love you market street starbucks
quick drive through always a great coffee or lattes only thing i see is that they need to keep their outside seating clean

this starbucks is convenient and like most of the other establishments delivers a similar experience i find it kind of funny that it s right next door to a dunkin donuts but maybe that s a benefit for those of us who don t want to pay for a scone made from organic power berries harvested from the heart of the jungles of expensivecoffeebeanland

located on the intersection at magazine and washington is this great starbucks location being on the intersection there are plenty of parking options available through out your visit there the line is always people long no matter what time i go but they usually manage to go through it pretty quickly which is nice on my last visit i wanted to try the gingerbread latte and i had a free birthday drink so when i placed my order i requested both of those the woman who took my order okayed it and along i went i paid with a different guy who ended up charging me for the drink which was supposed to free i explained that i told the other woman it was meant to be the free birthday special but he just laughed and said you have to tell me not her well she s the one that took my order so she should ve been the one to put me through the register too so that was annoying they just had no communication between the staff members and how he shrugged it off was irritating anyways i got my gingerbread latte and took a seat now this place is always busy so don t expect your ideal seating if you come too late in the day i ended up moving three times as new more preferred places to sit became available the downside to the seating is that there aren t many powerpoint available and starbucks has to know that people come to work here while they drink their coffee not a clever move the gingerbread latte was just okay it didn t taste like gingerbread at all so i was pretty disappointed but i managed to finish it off despite the lack of taste there is a wide variety of seating inside with wall seating tabled seating and a few couch seating which is nice there is also outdoor seating but during this weather it isn t recommended but would give you views of the street which is a nice distraction from the hustle and bustle from inside overall a beautiful location but the lack of communication and consideration the staff have between themselves and the customers made the visit spoiled

one of my absolute favourite starbucks locations in edmonton staff is well trained and always carry themselves professionally drive thru is fast efficient and is great for me as i am usually grabbing and running starbucks has some amazing products and this locations provides fast friendly and genuine service
finally a starbucks that does everything right i m so used to sub par starbucks places messing up my order they were nice everything was extra good

i have a starbucks gift card in my possession i went to use the gift card this morning at this location in the drive thru i ordered a cup of tea and an order of egg bites when i reached the window i handed the woman my card she said she couldn t scan it and do i have it on the phone app no i don t i have it in my hand she said she couldn t use it so i drove away without paying or getting my order because i was so infuriated she wouldn t enter the card manually when i got to work annoyed and hangry without breakfast i pulled out my phone and entered the card into the app and the full balance was on the card clearly this isn t an issue of she couldn t do it it s an issue of she wouldn t do it will never be back to this location am

never again will i go to delran starbucks on sunday november my mom and i went through the drive thru seeing how there was no one in line we waited at least minutes for the hippie dude to ring us up not once did he say i ll be right with you he continued to take other customers orders who went through the drive thru finally he rings us up and hands us our grande egg nog lattes hot with no sleeves and no whip cream last i checked starbucks advertises all their lattes with whip cream so why would the store decide not serve it that way we ask the hippie dude at the window to fix our drinks then he rings us up wrong so another person comes to the window us thinking it was the manager asking what the problem was and after we explain the boy asks us to pull around front and come inside to talk to our manager a girl who wasn t the manager but the shift leader refunded us our money and yes we got our drinks but the service at this starbucks in horrible especially for not being the morning rush time for starbucks to but up a coffee shop in cinnaminson nj

i was always a frequent patron of starbucks especially this location because it s so conveniently located to my house i just can t fathom paying starbucks prices anymore when there s so many other delicious local coffee spots in this area the inconsistency of their beverages and breakfast sandwiches is unbelievable no matter what kind of hot coffee you get it almost always taste burn all iced drinks come with entirely too much ice even if you ask for light ice and i ve bit into way too many cold centered breakfast sandwiches maybe they have gotten so mainstream and overly popular that they just don t put any care into what they are giving their customers anymore i d much rather go a few minutes out of my way to coffee places like bandit or black crow for a quality cup of coffee
parking is impossible not sure why i even pull into the lot when its backed up on the main road which is a little dangerous
great service full cup coffee justin and fabl are working amazing good location and good coffee

good furniture i like this location because they feature the most comfy chairs and couches of any starbucks in south tampa that makes hanging out here a pleasure the menu is the same as anywhere else and the staff turns over so what else can you say if you want to linger then this one is your starbucks location to choose it s also next to a panera bread if you want a pastry or sandwich and don t like any of the starbucks offerings
extremely sweet baristas this starbucks is always so friendly and clean drinks are great too
out of green tea in the middle of the day when it s and sunny you re better than that starbucks on the plus side after waiting minutes the barista who brought it out was super friendly

i ve been here several times and the service does not get any better today server sailor advice me not to get a specific drink because she didn t know how to make it so i had to change my order thanks to her overall she still messed up my order

oh starbucks how do i love you let me count the ways you have helped me numerous times during long shifts at work and more recently during the post thanksgiving sales in which i had to show up at the mall at am for work and for that i thank you i can not wait until we meet again for yet another hour shift yay for seasonal flavors

these guys made my day they were all smiles and positivity i made the mistake of sending my preorder to another location and they made it for me at glenn and campbell super fast on the spot they always make me feel welcome here it also felt very clean and safe plus they gave me a free holiday cup it doesn t get any better than that

i came for the wi fi as pjs coffee has lacking wifi power just a few shops down the road there was ample seating and my regular coffee was promptly handed to me creamer bar was well stocked clean floor and loud music like all the other homogonize starbucks you have ever been too

i never met a starbuck s that i didn t like until this one they were shorted staffed the morning that we visiting apparently an employee had wandered off leaving the other to fend for herself service was decent considering our beverages were good but seriously i was almost no longer in the mood that s how long it took to get them
worst baristas in town not only did they not follow the simple instructions for a latte on the side of the cup but they short changed me by a half a cup

the lady works in the counter for making drinks in the morning on sunday seems to be very mean or racist i said to the male employee that i wanted the drink to have no ice and he wrote it on the cup it was understandable that she mistook it for having ice but after i asked her to take the ice out she didn t even say a word with the mean face and took the ice out silently i said thank you to her and she still didn t want to say a word to me with the mean face but she said have a great day with a large smiley face to the white customers before and after me i m wondering if this is the overall starbuck employees attitudes to people with different color

busy and central location makes this a coffee stop and social event this location is open longer than the close by peets or the other starbucks in the la cumbre mall across the street the staff always keeps a good pace and sets a high standard for the slower starbucks

eew l just paid for a triple macchiato that tastes like nothing but milk no espresso in sight despite paying for extra espresso a mocha frappuccino that is basically ice and chocolate syrup you can even see the ice visibly separated from the syrup not in the least appetizing and a mocha that tastes like chocolate water first and last visit

normally starbucks is great consistent from location to location right well sadly not the case this location seems to struggle with the basics order a standard drink straight from the menu with no modifiers you should be ok i say should because some times they end up on the mobile stand when ordered via drive thru now if you order any drink with modification might as well skip this location something will be off wrong milk type or leave out the espresso not exaggerating calling won t change much as i ve done that head over to th street if you d like to get what you ordered if you want to roll the dice come here

zero sense of urgency in a place where you need it the most at an airport gate focus should be on expediting orders as quickly as possible line of about took me about minutes to arrive at the cashier then another minutes waiting for my food totally unacceptable and happens way too often at starbucks if the coffee wasn t so good i would never come here you re hanging on by a thread starbucks improve your ordering system and now

had a very nice experience here this morning we were pleasantly surprised they were open at am great coffee nice breakfast sandwich of egg white and turkey bacon on an english muffin very sweet young lady answered my menu questions and was quite charming you will find them by gate e

walked in this past week to the new starbucks out of morbid curiosity i was not acknowledged at all while the store was basically empty minus one guy on his laptop i waited a minute and a half to get service at the counter where i was rudely served my regular drip coffee was horrid and the service was even worse no actually check that the worst part about this whole thing is that there is another coffee shop in the same building the guy over there was super nice helpful and his coffee was outstanding apparently he has been in the building for years when tarbuck moved in what a bunch of greedy people not only am i never coming here again for my daily coffee i ll just walk an extra steps to get much better coffee and much better service p s if you don t like the other little guy in the building there are literally other places within a foot radius this was a poor job in picking out locations shame ding ding

this starbucks location is so busy especially in the mornings as it is the only north valleys location it is conveniently located right next to a freeway exit and has a drive thru going through the drive thru is definitely quicker than going inside i usually mobile order ahead though and this nearly always works for me but when the sticker machine was broken or my drink was wrong the employees at this location always made things right

the location of this starbucks is not the greatest you d think with it being right off i it would be but it s very difficult to get out especially if you have to make a right hand turn onto ina the staff is very friendly though and that makes up for the traffic problems

this location has the same menu as most this is a very small store they had plenty of employees and they were fine as far as doing their jobs however i never saw a smile the reason i am giving them stars is the floor was dirty the line floor where they were working was filthy and the cream sugar area was dirty with overflowing trash must be in need of a new manager if it were my store some heads would roll it s christmas time would a smile be too much to ask for
just moved to roxborough and i walked there after going to the bank very friendly staff they complimented my accent and gave me great service i shall return

if you ve been to one starbucks you ve been to them all when it comes to the food drinks prices and the overall appearance we stopped by at around pm to do some studying work and just bought a cookie it was perfectly toasted and delicious what i love about this starbucks is there is plenty of seating there s large shared tables bars small tables etc there are also outlets everywhere like some of the starbucks in my area the staff try to make the atmosphere more welcoming this starbucks also has a riddle of the day where you can ask the barista for the answer and a bookshelf in the back to leave take a book as well as some games the parking lot is not proportional to the number of seats in the starbucks but luckily it was not busy so we were able to get a spot they also have reserved parking spaces for those just stopping in for mobile orders or anyone who was only parking for minutes for any night owls that prefer to grind do work later in the day i would recommend this location

the customer service is at it s finest at this starbucks the manager paul is one of the kindest people that i have met in philadelphia his service goes above and beyond you definitely leave with a smile
drive thru is super convenient but can be slow especially during the weekday mornings seems understaffed at times but so far havent had an issue with an order

this is the location in canal place line moved quickly and i ordered the peppermint hot cocoa the cashier rang me up then a barista said we only have skinny mocha for hot chocolate i m not a regular visitor but how do you not have enough syrup to make the hot cocoa especially on a cold day

the staff in this location are great always friendly welcoming it is a very small location and sometimes very cramped so unless it s not a grande pike i am ordering i pre order through the app i love this in the summer they have a patio that is nice to sit in no way would i chill inside and have a coffee way to cramped

this morning i went into starbucks excited because i have an interview and what better way to start my day than with starbucks i was terribly mistaken i ordered a vanilla iced chai latte with almond milk the milk was extra moldy so i nicely went over and said miss i think your almond milk is bad she says have you ever had it with almond milk before and it says it doesn t expire until in my head i m thinking miss why does the expiration date matter when you can clearly see lumpy milk in my drink she then proceeds to have this girl with crochet braids in her hair her braids have nothing to do with this but if a manager happens to see this then you know who i have been dealing with all morning make me a new drink and pretty much she just gave me a cup of milk i really could scream because this is not the way i wanted to start my day especially with an interview this morning i almost never right a review but i had to get this off my chest especially when i spent in there this morning btw the girl i spoke of earlier also rolled her eyes at another customer service was just terrible from this location this morning

awful service ordered ahead on my phone and still had to wait minutes for my drink that turned out wrong when i told the barista it wasn t supposed to be iced he said oh next time it will be in the house right

this is probably the worst starbucks i ve ever been to but that isn t the fault of the workers there i feel quite bad for them it s always so incredibly busy and they are always short staffed i don t know if this location is just trying to save some payroll or what but management needs to reevaluate their staffing needs kudos to the staff for dealing with it
they forgot my drink and she rudely said i would have gotten that walked off asked again and then they finally made it

was really excited when this starbucks opened because it was so much more convenient than the glasgow location was hoping as time went on they would work out the kinks and get in a groove couldn t have been more wrong i almost always have to repeat my drink order times because the person taking my order is also making drinks they are constantly running out of something brews cups etc today my egg bites came in an oatmeal cup i thought it was oatmeal so i circle back and go in only to be told we were out of the egg bite trays we should have told you they never have enough staff and the drive thru takes forever find another starbucks on your route and skip this one
starbucks always has good customer service the best variety menu comfortable and never disappoints
i smellllll cough feeeee say it with an new york accent it s fun

while they focus on getting the cars through the drive through in a timely manner they lose focus on what a five dollar cup of coffee should be i gave them two tries and i got quite possibly the two worst cups of coffee i ve ever had a call to the store with my frustration was met by a very young and sharpie voice telling me to come back and let them remake my cup of coffee doesn t that defeat the purpose the bottom line isif you re looking for a good cup of starbucks coffee and have a few extra moments make the drive to winthrop

i love that this starbucks is soo close to work i get a grande hot chocolate and everything bagel with cream cheese almost every morning i know super unhealthy right anyway the point is this place gives me my breakfast and i like the baristas here they are super friendly and nice
very busy good food and coffee as usual if you don t mind fighting your way through the drunk homeless sitting out front begging for your change then it might be worth it
the slowest drive thru ever minutes in line not acceptable maybe more staff need to speed it up

hands down the best customer service in the industry right here my wife and i have been coming to this location for years and always have an incredible experience with the employees when we come in huge shout out to parker for always being friendly and always making the best drinks this will always be our coffee spot

every time i have been in this starbucks there s no more than a few people in front of me and at least one table free i m sure it s a busy location but i ve been fortunate it hasn t been crazy busy there can be a few others by the milk area but it clears up quickly i usually get the refresh tea for and like the mint taste the staff are friendly and efficient the last time i came most people were seating on the patio so there was available indoor seating the locations makes this one of my favourite starbucks it s close to fun shops to check out and great to stop in for a mid shopping drink there are benches outside if it s too busy inside parking lot can get busy but there s residential streets that you can likely find a spot and enjoy a little walk

i m a pharma rep and am always ordering a lot of drinks when i go in today this location was especially busy but the baristas were still so kind and helpful despite the fact that i had to place a drink order they worked quickly to get me all my drinks and make sure everything was right i appreciated their pleasant demeanor and helpfulness

i mean in terms of starbucky ness it s fine and since they take so long to make a latte you can place your order head over to the pharmacy to grab a few things you ve been neglecting or forgetting to get the last times you ve been to fry s pay then head back just in time to grab your drink and go maybe that s just me

i met a friend here once a week and the service is always quick but not very personal there are so many people here is hard to find a place to sit not a good place to work but a great location and fast service

i wish they had more seating this place has a great warm cozy vibe i m pretty certain if they had comfy seats it would be hard to get people me to leave i m guessing it caters to the millions of people who work here in the comcast building which totally makes sense vs the occasional passerby who wants to sit relax for a while otherwise it s a starbucks just like any of their other places as far as drinks food goes
this starbucks is in a great location but don t be surprised when you go here and wait upwards of minutes in a short drive thru line the wait times are always awful

this is the single handed slowest starbucks location i ve ever been to i ve come here multiple times and always wait min plus i ve tried different times of day the drive through going inside etc i hate to leave a negative review because i am not that kind of person i am very patient but from a business standing point of view something absolutely needs to change here i pulled up to the drive through at and then got half way by i was just about to round the corner into the part of the drive through that i would not be able to leave from after min of sitting i looked at the clock and realized the cars in front of me would take at least another so i left without anything this area is busy yes but i have years of bartending and barista experience and this entire staff moves very slow they are in need of some all star baristas added to their team for a reformation of speed and multi tasking sorry for the negative review but something needs to change at this place as it is beyond making excuses for at this point

don t order a cappuccino they don t know how to make foam i specifically requested an extra dry cap and got extra bubbly milk that resembled a milkshake customer service was good just need more training on how to make proper foam it s not that hard don t think i ll be coming back since it was for a drink that wasn t authentic that s conglomerates for you

they just opened last year and every time we pass by they are alway super super busy the line is always at least people but they actually move pretty fast because they have enough people working so that s good if you like starbucks then make sure stopping by when you are shopping

i really dont see the thrill of coming to starbucks and their customers are the worst uppity rude and impatient to say the least some of the worst drivers and parkers good news is they come here so i choose to go somewhere else i refuse to follow the cult

although it has starbucks in the marquis the experience ends there the two stars as follows clean it s a starbucks there is another option on the delta side smaller but better this one has a sitting area and tables the delta side does not

not up to the high standards of service that most starbucks are know for i ordered a triple grande caramel mach and when i got it it felt like only two thirds full i was in a hurry so i didn t complain as i should have as i was leaving i stopped to go to the restroom and a pregnant young woman coming out warned me there was no toilet paper i went into the other restroom and it was also out of paper and dirty very disconcerting

if you re looking to get work done do not come to this starbucks for a solid half hour they were playing extremely loud rock music complete with a lot of yelling that was blaring throughout the store the music was quiet at first and at a bearable level and then one of the employees it turned it to the highest possible volume i looked around at the other patrons there and everyone seemed equally as annoyed this is probably the rd time the high volume of the music has made me left this store i will not be coming back

if i could give this location zero stars i would every day for the last months i come here to get cold brew i wait in the min hr long drive through not an exaggeration and i get my cold brew if you try to go inside and order you are still waiting for all the drive through food to be prepared so it takes a long time as well inside as of a couple months ago they just run out of cold brew so i now wait an hour sometimes in the drive through to not get a cold brew unless they decide to just give me an iced coffee without telling me i don t understand how you run out of a cold brew every day for two months and don t start preparing several batches the night before worst starbucks in all of florida and possibly even the us

today we got two kids size chai teas one vanilla latte one cold brew one of the kids chais was milk and the other had chai i told the cashier and asked for a cup to mix the two together so they could each have some of the chai mix she gave me the cup without offering to fix their drinks the cold brew ended up being a nitro which we did not want never had this kind of experience with starbucks
terrible wait time to pick up a coffee need to speed up service multiple cashiers or another drive thru no straws and asked for half syrup but not half

for the most part this location does a decent job in delivering good temperature appropriate food beverages on many occasions they ve forgotten to give napkins condiments and or handed items out of the window one by one rather than putting everything into a bag i know there s a pandemic going on and shortages on supply but let s think logically and give the customers what they need

tends to get crowder but i need my daily fix i like this location because of the close proximity to the turnpike and route also has outdoor seating and better parking than the starbucks that s closer to my office

sure starbuck s is starbuck s but it s all about the customer service one time i ordered a venti iced soy chai tea latte and got an are you effing kidding me look from the guy behind the counter what s wrong with a chai latte iced with soy i don t think i m being that high maintenance i did have to smile to myself however when he spilled it just as he was putting the lid on and had to re make it also for some reason this location does not make iced coffee in winter when i ordered it i was told they don t make it in winter but she could make it another way for me if i liked so i said yes and i don t know what she did but it was about times better than their regular iced coffee ok so this is a plus but i still hate the place also i ve witnessed who i assume is the manager berating an employee on the phone for being late once again right in front of the customers which i thought was extremely unprofessional overall poor service it s never speedy and i m usually worried they are going to get some aspect of the drink wrong saw a guy wait so long for his misto he had to leave before it was ready lame
it is great to have a starbucks in the silver legacy it is the same as other starbucks the real advantage here is the location
there is a minute wait every time i go through the drive through and times out of they get my drink wrong the only reason i go back is because it s close to my college

on my travels on canal street i d pass the downtown sheraton starbuck s sign today i gave it a try it is located at the canal street entrance i came at a busy time they were fast and too busy to be friendly i had a choice of plush chairs tables and bar chairs overlooking canal street with the marriott i chose the bar chairs i got plenty of sunlight which probably kept my coffee warmer and did some great people watching

i go here all the time and there is literally never the same employees very confusing not sure if it s a training store or what sadly my cloud macchiato was completely wrong today even more sad i expected it because my orders have been messed up in the past every employee i ve come in contact with is super nice though

as others has said this is by far one of the slowest locations i ve ever been at one person working taking orders and working as a cashier the majority of my time in the drive thru was listening to her taking orders a definite need for more help or training my frappe was very good but melted a little while i waited to be served

i love this starbucks my favorite place to study the baristas are so friendly happy and frequently give discounts and freebies to regulars and free samples of food to everyone also i ve never not been able to find a place to sit outlets are usually available only a handful of times have i had to wait about half an hour for one to open up also when the weather s nice there s a great covered porch outside with lights and ceiling fans and outlets it s true that their internet is restricted to t mobile at t sbc customers but i think that actually keeps the place from getting overcrowded with students during peak study times i suppose they go to pjs or rue instead however if you know someone with a password for one of those providers you can use it unlimitedly i ve shared my password with a friend there and we were both able to log on using it at the same time i would love to support local coffee shops and i ve tried but all the places close to me have fatal flaws too crowded and no tables during peak hours times rue on carrollton too few outlets and trash all over the place pjs on maple apathetic bordering on rude sometimes baristas terribly low lighting too few outlets rue on magazine zots way too dark
horribly slow when it was almost empty and a bunch of degenerates hanging around
you might say that a starbucks is a s starbucks and in many ways you d be right the difference here is the staff super friendly and fun

i hate to say it but while at a comic convention at the nugget i stopped by the starbucks to get an iced latte and what i got was a five dollar cup of ice it was literally so packed full of ice i could not insert the straw i don t know if the barista was new if this was just a mistake or if starbucks tells its employees to do this but i m kind of angry that i paid five dollars for essentially ounces of latte i guess the moral is when at starbucks make sure to ask for less ice or no ice so you get your money s worth

we stopped in for a iced tea on a very warm day customer service was good my tea was good as well the store felt very warm inside and we ended up going out and sitting in the car with air on to cool off
speedy and friendly service excellent customer service and great food highly recommend
ordered a breve latte got something else with half the cup filled with foam staff was busy but apparently too busy to fix my order

thank you doth such a place share such an idea with a complement reader seeks a very refined polite female acquaintance who may further an incomplete introduction to society though discreetly background
go off peak hours or plan to wait in line if you re not in a rush this is a great place to meet read work their staff is friendly
stopped here to get some coffee real quick i was happy they had a drive through the guy at the drive through made my day with his sense of humor

most unorganized and dysfunctional starbucks i have ever been to as a gold member nothing makes my day more than my afternoon coffee workers are rude and appear as they don t want to be bothered staff is overwhelmed with the massive drive through line and there have been several times they have told me they can t make my drink due to them being out of certain things such as cold brew and sweet cream not your typical starbucks that s for sure something is always off at this one very disappointing

these guys love me and i love them too i come here every weekend this place is always packed because it s right across the street from a college feel free to chat with the staff when it s chill they re all really cool i also recommend the lemon loaf holy cow so good
love going to this starbucks always greeted by bradley s great personality they always make my drink exactly how i like it drive thru however slow at times

i come to this at starbucks drive thru pretty religiously since it s close to work and they have the friendliest baristas i usually see the same guy and thought man he s really friendly but then i ve had a few other people mixed in where i drove away delighted at how friendly and outgoing they are
super quick when you re in need of some caffeine and breakfast first thing in the am
parking can be difficult during morning hours drive thru is your best bet

i do not usually rate stars unless everything is excellent the service is stars one of the best americanos i have ever had they treated me with respect and answered all of my crazy questions calmly and comfortably the atmosphere is calm and inviting i travel a lot and have never been more satisfied thank you guys and gals for an amazing experience
it s a starbucks by name not quality all the food prices in the case are covered so you don t know how much they are charging for the food

so i know there are a lot of neighbors refuse corporate brews campaigns around and in a coffee city why choose starbucks first of all i like the consistency in flavor and price i can t do cc s coffee flavored water and pj s is over a dollar more for the type of drink i order but all of that aside i will go out of my way to go to this starbucks location because it is a wonderful oasis where everyone is friendly and efficient and things are clean and orderly and there is lot of safe parking the baristas baristos they ve always been all men in my experience kind of give off that douchey i m super knowledgable about coffee vibe but they seem to care a lot about customer service and that is an a in my book

my favorite starbucks of all it is such a beautiful building inside and out what they did to the inside of the place is amazing it makes me want to hang out there and just people watch even though i have to get back to work the staff there is super friends and they seem like they really take pride in preparing great beverages even when the place has a line almost out of the door i love the wall of coffee and coffee drinking accessories when you walk in it s hard to resist buying some of that stuff when you are waiting in line the case that the pastries is in is very pleasing to the eye thank god they have the calories posted next to each type of goodie or i might put some weight on from my frequency of visitation it s nice to look at not nice to my waist line although i would like to suggest to the owner of that location that it would be awesome if they had some kind of deal with a nearby bakery that provided them with king cake but i don t know starbucks probably has a conglomerate code that would interfere with that kind of thing

drum roll please review coming right up i chose to review starbucks as my th review because it is a guilty pleasure something that i only allow myself once a week but something that i crave everyday this particular starbucks is great the baristas are always friendly and welcoming the drinks are made correctly and quickly i usually go with a salted caramel hot chocolate or mocha i also occasionally order the white mocha if you can t tell i enjoy coffee that doesn t taste like coffee in the summer their iced teas are the perfect thirst quencher their breakfast pastry items are always delicious try the cranberry orange scone and you will not be disappointed their breakfast sandwiches are unique and pretty tasty as well i always choose to go in and place my order over sitting in the drive thru the line for their drive thru is always ridiculously long it s usually quicker to go in
big open windows great customer service and clean atmosphere if i was to have a business meeting this would be a nice location in which there are multiple tables for occupants
orders are consistently wrong extremely slow service stay away how this place is still in business is beyond me
slow and slower don t understand why it takes them mins to make a green ice tea need better management
first time here yesterday wasn t busy at all friendly staff quick service one of the best starbucks i ve ever been to service with a smile that s the way it should be and the way it is here

it s a starbucks you know what their coffee tastes like meh and what their prices are like high so i ll tell you why this became my starbucks they recently renovated the seating and it s a great study spot reliable wifi big tables in the middle a comfy couch in the corner and seating all alongside the window read convenient outlets and people watching huge improvement to the awkward tiny circular tables they had before it can get randomly crowded sometimes why any family would decide to bring all their children here for an afternoon or why a mom would bring teens to drink frappucinos is beyond me the barristas are nice one of them made fun of me for having been there every day for a week when writing the paper that wouldn t die i appreciated that he noticed i still prefer independent coffee shops like citadelle or toast but when i m too lazy to go that far this will do plus i m a sucker for that passion iced tea in the summer get it half sweetened it s better and for it s pretty good

with a fork stab to the back of my hand if i even thought about reaching across the table to try a bite the folks from starbucks love to say wake up and smell the coffee starbucks is everywhere and rightly so as the world s specialty coffee retailer has more than coffee shops in more than countries they ve built a massively successful brand and you have to admire all of that work and the quality this starbucks is rumored to be the highest grossing starbucks in the midwest if the drive thru and in house lines are any indication of the accuracy of that statement then they truly are there s nothing i can say about starbucks here that hasn t been said written about etc but i ve been to many a starbucks and this one is well just a great experience at any time of the day the staff is wonderful and always greets the regulars by name seldom do i even have to tell them what my order is they will usually ask if i m having whatever my usual drink is for that period of time and promptly serve it up for me on the very rare occasion that your drink isn t up to your taste standards they want you to tell them they ll gladly remake any order to satisfy their customers the store is clean and well maintained but the configuration could have been given a bit more consideration for example the drive thru lines up right in front of the entrance it creates a considerable amount of traffic and presents a potential hazard for patrons going in out of the building similarly there are a few parking spots right in front of the door beware if parking in these spots due to the way the drive thru wraps around the building and crosses behind these parking slots if you are parked there and need to get out quickly hope to god the drive thru line isn t too long or you re going to be stuck in your parking spot until the line passes by the good thing is the baristas in this starbucks are fast and accurate they generally keep the drive thru line moving at a pretty goods pace that certainly is appreciated when you are short on time they have an outdoor seating area but again it bumps right up against the drive thru line so consequently your conversation is constantly interrupted by customers placing orders or loud cars and stereos enjoying a nice latte right next to a running car isn t the most pleasant experience the indoor seating area is less than adequate sure there are tables and chairs but on a saturday sunday morning they fill up quick leaving you no other option but to sit outside or take your order to go but as i stated aside from these physical shortcomings the exceptional staff more than makes up for it and the product quality speaks for itself

be prepared to be underwhelmed and even slightly dissatisfied i am without a doubt a very loyal starbucks customer and have been for years to the point that i definitely have my local to me locations but i stop by on a daily basis this does not make me an expert but it does make me a consistent consumer who is knowledgeable about starbucks products and services this location is located inside of the gsr hotel in reno and is frequented by predominantly hotel guests and staff i can t imagine someone stopping by the hotel just to go to this specific starbucks the seating area is ridiculous while it is open seating it s located near the check in out counters as well as gambling sections it s just not a great spot location overall the service is close to horrendous and the staff is just the same i ordered two different drinks both fairly easy to make and i was the second person in line with no one else behind me my drinks took close to minutes to be made yes you read that correctly minutes for two drinks and no one else was waiting once the drinks were ready despite the fact that i was standing fairly close to the counter waiting the barista put them on the counter and walked away did not call out my name let me know that the drinks were mine versus maybe a mobile order etc then to top it off both drinks were made incorrectly unfortunately i did not discover this until i had already left the counter and was on my way outside of the hotel no one wants to trek back into a hotel that is currently under construction and frankly has become a hot mess to get in and out of and let s face it who wants to deal with unpleasant people when they are handling our food and or beverages would i stop by this location again more than likely only under desperation my two stars are because if nothing else the seating area and counters are clean

it s super nice having another starbucks on the other side of the highway as it cuts down on time when i m south of i love the location unfortunately when it comes to the food beverages it s a different story i ve gone in several days in a row since they have opened and have had nothing but problems to start i ordered a decaf drink which was not made as decaf i have a caffeine sensitivity that causes heart issues for me so after drinking my beverage i experienced an extremely high heart rate for the better part of two hours i ve also ordered white mocha hot chocolates a couple times and received the white mochas with coffee instead luckily i can taste the difference when coffee is in a drink so i was able to avoid any caffeine effects on my heart but nonetheless still disappointing in regard to the taste and make of the beverages themselves i ve also been pretty disappointed any drink containing syrup and milk tends to only taste like milk so i m unsure if the proper proportions of each ingredient are being used or if the recipes are being followed correctly i also believe there is something wrong with their nitrogen when it comes to the nitro cold brew more than half of the cup ends up being foam even after the drink settles the amount of cold brew i receive in a grande is not even enough to fill up a tall cup lastly i ve noticed that when i ask for extra caramel drizzle they are only using as much as a normal order and not coating the cup drink in the necessary places there has been several times where i will ask for cinnamon to be steamed into milk and it is not being done the taste difference is something you can t miss on that nonetheless watching the baristas so customizations aren t always being followed i ve also ordered food several times only to receive the incorrect item just this morning i ordered a double smoked bacon sandwich with no egg only to receive an impossible sandwich while the customer service is great and everyone is friendly i question if the baristas have received enough proper training i m in a bit of a rut because i desperately want to shop at this location frequently as the location is convenient and the store itself is absolutely beautiful and very well kept and clean however it becomes stressful worrying about my health when it comes to receiving non decaf when asking for decaf it s also such a let down for the place to be as inconsistent as it is i can understand that things happen but the same issues occurring again and again every visit cannot be a coincidence i don t feel comfortable spending on breakfast or lunch knowing that it will have some issue and i will not always have the time to flag down an employee for a drink or food remake this place has amazing potential but there s definitely some kinks that need to be worked out i will probably spend the extra time to drive to the starbucks on the other side of the highway as i know the small amount of wait time will be worth knowing i m receiving food and beverage to the starbucks standard we all know and love

i think this is a great starbucks location in tampa it s located on the corner of a busy intersection at kennedy and westshore making it equally accessible for you to leave and go take care of multiple things that you need to do in the area or for you to come from various locations in the area to take a quick coffee break unlike starbucks locations that are closer to downtown this location is located in a plaza with ample parking making it a more stress free option when you are on your coffee run the inside of the store is spacious with lots of table seating i also really like the addition of high top table seating in the middle of the store it makes for a more communal feel and it also allows slightly larger groups of people to congregate and meet up always a plus for a coffee shop the staff here are courteous and take care of your drink or food orders fast and the bathrooms are quite clean another plus considering the high volume of people that pass through the store will definitely drop by if i m in the area again

someone gave me a starbucks gift certificate for christmas which is a funny gift to give me because i never go to starbucks the giver kinda doesn t know me very well in vienna i go to the old viennese coffeehouses or to the cool indie ones but not to starbucks and i only go to non chain cafes in phillytown but i had this certificate and there is one near me in chestnut hill so i thought i d better use it well to me the chestnut hill starbucks sorta looks like the couple of other starbucks i ve been in in my life and the food items i ordered were all okay but not outstanding at all they included a sausage and cheese sandwich a cinnamon morning roll and a banana nut bread all had been made elsewhere and wrapped up for sale here the sausage and cheese on an english muffin was particularly bland but then there were some pleasant surprises the staff at the chestnut hill starbucks was super friendly and trying to be helpful very ingratiating and i noticed how it was functioning like a neighborhood caf as there were several people just hanging out and working on their computer or reading a book chestnut hill doesn t have many cafes so this starbucks has become a neighborhood gathering spot anyway that s a big plus and even though i will prob not be hitting up starbucks again anytime soon i m glad it is there at the top of chestnut hill for the many people who do enjoy its hot drinks food items and unhurried atmosphere

and you re taking forever slow i mean dude you re literally moving like you got some methadone right before your shift slow forget airport speed it wasn t even starbucks speed heck it wasn t even dmv speed just awful next all the employees behind the order taker disappeared into the back at the same time and spent a good almost minutes back there meaning no orders were even being processed during let s face it starbucks are like walgreen s one on just about every corner in town for the coffee lover that s a good thing because you know you are never far from a hot cup of java the thing that sets this particular starbucks apart is the congenial helpful staff often i stop in not for coffee but because i m having a bit of a down day and need a lift in spirit with very few exceptions the baristas here always seem to enjoy helping their customers and that s something you don t see every day i know that no matter what the situation or time of day i can count on sandy shelly emily heidy patrick and the rest of the staff to not only put a smile on my face and a tasty drink in my hand but to make me feel valued as a customer and a friend a tip for value and the best tasting cup of coffee you can get at starbucks treat yourself to a french press to me that is the only way to discover the true flavor of the many coffees available be sure and ask your barista about food pairings to go with your coffee too it is amazing the flavors you can experience when food and coffee are properly matched now for the drawbacks my past couple of visits here i ve noticed a disturbing trend one of the managers at least he acts like a manager i can t be positive has a bad habit of talking down to the rest of the staff and tends to be a bit of a tool from some of the comments i ve heard it seems like he may have some unresolved anger issues if he weren t of above average stature i d say it was a napoleon complex not sure what his deal is but it makes me wonder about what kind of people skills starbucks requires managerial candidates to have while it hasn t been enough yet to make me not return it s getting really close

would be stars but i will happily round that up we went on the day we visited longwood gardens since we left late morning we had to find a place to eat for lunch before visiting the gardens considering i m a starbucks we decided to eat here this location is just a few blocks away from the entrance to the parking lot of the gardens easily located right off of us this starbucks is part of a strip mall known as the the shoppes at longwood village hey if the shoppers need their caffeine fix for buying clothes or groceries they certainly have this place for that if you see the sign for this strip mall then you ll know that starbucks is in there this however is part of a smaller building which is separate from the main building where other stores including anchors are attached because this parking lot is huge finding a spot was never a problem we walked into the store it was small but not the smallest that we ve ever been to they had some areas for you to sit at but it s never enough to accommodate a huge crowd who wants to sit down and unwind with coffee and or food while accessing the free wifi which was how i checked in here via yelp lol at least the wooden chairs were okay and the table was clean the people behind the registers were nice and our paninis were toasted up without issue we also got some iced white mochas too and they were good especially on a warm day as we were eating a lady from behind the register approached us and offered some samples of two of their seasonal items one of them was a michigan cherry oat bar and that tasted really good another item was a small berry drink i don t remember the exact name of it nor didn t i care for it as i thought it was just okay it s not often i get free samples from starbucks since i was being a patron and because of this generous act the full rating is warranted overall the store was nice and customer service was flawless i would say that this is as good as it gets woo d

this was a welcomed surprise to have a starbucks caf inside of tgh usually the hospital starbucks locations are more of a kiosk but not this one i was happy to see all the seasonal pumpkin spice offerings even though i was mostly interested in getting a cool refresher drink after being in the west pavilion waiting room which seemed like forever okay well it was really just most of the day the mango dragon fruit refresher was exactly what i needed and was just as good as i expected it to be this location appeared to be fully stocked with grab go items as well i was there around pm and only a few people in line if you happen to be in the west pavilion just take a right at the golden tree of life and follow the signs to starbucks mcdonald s you can t miss it it will be on your left if you re anywhere else in the hospital and don t see the signage then just ask one of the many friendly tgh staff members they will point you to the right direction

stars mostly only for shock value let me preface this by saying that i am not a fan of starbucks i think their coffee is over caffeinated and often burnt their espresso drinks lame at best and everything over priced in fact when i am trying to decide on a cafe to go to starbucks doesn t even make it to the list of options however i must admit that starbucks is extremely convenient they are everywhere and they are open late so when i needed to find a place to study late tonight i decided to go to the green hills starbucks for the first time in maybe years so i walked in tonight with my friend and i couldn t stop my jaw from dropping over and over again and the exclamation wow from coming out of my mouth why because the place has gotten an extreme makeover it s probably to do with the whole new starbucks branding marketing goals but anyway all of the furniture has been replaced with wooden counterparts and comfy couches it has an entirely different feel less commercial and more local and authentic the gigantic study table with electrical outlets has been replaced by benches on the wall bar stools and any other kind of seating you can imagine and the outlets are now impossible to find because they have been painted the same exact brown as the wall which led me to create an extremely awkward situation as i walked around the entire border of the room looking for a plug for my dying laptop despite an inspiring renovation of the entire atmosphere of the place obviously the quality of the drinks has not improved astonished by the new look i inquired the barista about when they redid the place to which she replied last year in february embarrassed i chuckled took my drink and slowly walked away clearly i am behind the times anyway great new feel and atmosphere this one is much more social for starbucks even though the drinks haven t changed so if you must resort to going to starbucks this is the one i would recommend

i come to this starbucks several times a week mostly using the drive through but also coming inside often to work the staff is friendly and knowledgeable they seem to keep their staff there s not a lot of turnover and constant training the drive through is really quick the amount of seating is pretty good for a smaller sized starbucks there s a public table in the middle where you can sit and plug in your laptop it s pretty quiet most of the time i would honesty give it five stars but two things made me hesitate this starbucks has floor to ceiling windows on two sides which makes it really bright and inviting but it is so cold in the winter it s difficult to work with your coat on there are a couple of regulars who come in don t purchase anything and sit and sleep in the chairs they smell like they haven t showered in quite a while and the entire place starts to smell like that i feel for them and i wouldn t want them to be put out in the cold but sometimes it becomes really unbearable i don t have an answer for it it s really sad and unfortunate occasionally i ll buy them coffee they re super sweet and kind but it keeps me from holding business meetings here in the mornings i ll choose another coffee shop nearby overall great fast awesome starbucks one of my favorites

i ordered a traveler for a meeting a traveler is a cardboard box full of delicious whatever you want i get the blonde roast cause that s what those brainy people like i ve worked here at the tgh for years and love that there is a place like this here it s a safe haven for employees and patient family alike stepping into another world for a break from life i called at night to order my traveler it wasn t ordered in the morning so i was late to my meeting made me look bad but i still love this place

located under the radar within a target department store this hidden gem of reno is must see for anyone looking for a good coffee and even better service this coffee shop bleeds the kind of atmosphere you thought only existed on television you can sit back and relax with your coffee for a minute as the world moves around you a melting pot of people bustle back and forth within the red walls of the store in a rush for the hottest deals as almost character like employees interact and whip up drinks with a frenzied synergy that contradicts your expectations of what working for a soul crushing seattle based corporation must be like with dazzling smiles the baristas address their customers by name it is clear that the people warmly taking in their morning coffee are regulars they could go anywhere so why do they go here to a chain located within a chain it can only be because of the excellent customer service the dynamic dark roast duo behind the counter are named diana and kelsey and between discussing the intricacies of french cinema and canine american rights they are delivering the precise orders of their dazzled customers at a lightning pace curious to see how they would treat a newcomer i approached the counter and struggled to figure out what to purchase with a smile kelsey suggested i try a crystal ball drink that resembled the bad guy in the last spider man movie diana interjected and suggested a variation of the drink that was much better this personal touch and recommendation had me instantly sold despite my eager enthusiasm they even offered to let me sample it first assuring me it was not a problem it was like they d known me for years and i instantly understood why so many people chose to visit this location the drink was made to perfection and in that crystal ball drink i saw myself returning here in my future the service didn t stop there though after offering me an ice cold water they managed to inject the frozen h o croutons very adeptly i watched as an errant child projectile vomited all over the wall his mother nowhere to be found the girls were on top of it instantly cleaning the mess and directing customers with practiced ease while calling for assistance with the child i was stunned by their rapid response to add to the situation i watched as a target employee stumbled over and attempted to rattle the girls with incessant questions about a show called duck tales with patient looks the girls answered his questions to satisfaction and it became clear to me that they were truly prepared for anything this red walled hub might throw at them do yourself a favor and visit this starbucks located within target if diana and kelsey are making drinks with confidence as cool as the frappuccinos i can guarantee you ll leave with a smile parking kinda sucks though

i like starbucks in general but this particular location is fantastic it is definitely not your typical starbucks it was remodeled a few months back and now features a very cool open terrace mezzanine seating level above the bar they also have some outdoor seating on state street this location also has one of those clover brewers and several varieties of high end coffee available that they custom brew for you this location is across the street from my office and i go there several times each week most of the staff knows my name and they also know my drink depending upon what time of day it is that i come in this seems to be the case for alot of other customers besides too that s impressive when you consider the volume of business they do here the interior is kept clean at all times and due to the unique floor plan ther eis almost always somewhere to sit as soon as my drink is ready there are a few starbucks location on state street in downtown santa barbara but i think this location is the best

the service at this starbucks is super slow from the moment you walk in you feel as if something fishy is up with the store the glass on the front door is cracked with no tape or warning signs safety hazard i know vandalism happens but make sure your customers are not going to get near it or use the door next the line was only three people deep me being that third person and it took a good minutes to get to the front the three workers were doing the following one was making drinks by herself the next one was on the register trying to ring up orders and she seemed a little distracted chatting five of the ten minutes away with her friend who was buying one item the last guy was chatting away with the girl on the register distracting her from her job after we ordered our drinks we waited another minute for them to arrive now i know this is typical of a crazy morning a lunchtime rush or any busy period in the day but none of this was happening when we got our drinks we asked for one cardboard sleeve for our own cup that we brought the girl making drinks was not only rude about it to us she was rude about it to the lady in front of us about the same thing a couple of suggestions to the manager owner first put a manager in that team second if the cardboard sleeves are that big of a hassle put out a dispenser of them and customers won t have to ask for them we were about to spend x what we did spend but since the service was terrible we decided not to and almost walked out and went to our preferred store about two miles away

today is supposed to be my day for returning phone calls and emails and lots of paperwork but horror of horrors i ve been on the road so much that i completely forgot to check the status of the pantry for green tea before i started boiling the water this morning fearing a bad case of the shakes from early morning tea withdrawal i grabbed my car keys and headed down the road to starbucks this particular starbucks sits on the corner of dale mabry and linebaugh avenue within walking distance of my condo when i first moved to carrollwood the space was occupied by a skanky long john silvers which thankfully closed was gutted by the developer and re opened as a really nice starbucks the interior looks less like an industrial strength coffee house and more like a very comfortable study reading room with lots of places to sit and relax i m not a big fan of coffee and especially not the jumbo grande mocha frappacino double shot espresso salted caramel latte crap that most people seem to like instead i just wanted a basic cup of freshly brewed green tea oh and one of those yummy looking blueberry scones as well please the barrista seemed to appreciate my needs perhaps it was the dark circles under my eyes and the way i was chewing on my lower lip and she quickly rushed to pour me a large green tea and fork over the scone sighs happily the tea was flavorful and calming and the scone was fresh and delicious i found a corner table and sat down to read the front section of the tampa bay times while watching the other harried morning commuters lining up for their fresh shot o joe before starting their work day this particular starbucks opens at in the morning and stays open till or so at night they have a drive through window which seems popular with the vapid latte crowd who are too busy blabbing away on their cellphones to come into the store fine by me like ya know well done starbucks and thanks for saving my day
just fyi for people who like to work and study in coffee shops this one only has one table with an outlet nearby which sucks it s a really nice clean environment otherwise

if you are looking for the perfect combination of coffee drinks and people watching then this is the place for you with the perfect location in new hope there is never a dull moment with the hustle and bustle of this wonderfully populated town the location is perfect for people watching but the parking can be tricky on busy days such as the weekends all meters are taken and it may take a few trips around to find a spot the starbuck s is a hidden gem among all the other glammed and obvious shops throughout new hope the simplicity of the brick is important with the pleasant porch that has chairs and tables sets the mood even before a customer sets foot in the shop the interior of this starbucks is very neat and tidy with a relaxing feel if staying a long time do not fear the bathrooms are very clean but only have one bathroom for each sex which can become inconvenient if a line forms as it is such a prime location many customers are only to be expected at certain times such as weekends there are lines that are not the most convenient when waiting for your delicious beverage the beverages and snacks to go with are very good do not be afraid if you have a special request the workers are very friendly and appreciate good clientele as much as you appreciate good workers walking in the large doors you will be engulfed in the delicious smell of different coffees after getting your drink and scone you can choose to go to the inside seating where there are both seats with tables as well as comfy arm chairs to sit back and relax while sipping your drink on a nice day i recommend sitting outside and enjoying the town from one of the tables on the outside porch this starbucks is best for the atmosphere the town itself brings i assume everyone knows the basics of starbucks from the different options of drinks to tall grande and venti size since starbucks is a chain coffee store i would say the one in new hope is best for its surroundings and the feel of the place

maybe it was just an off day or maybe it was because of training new people but this was kind of a confusing starbucks experience i guess i might be spoiled because most starbucks locations really get the concept of the customer experience right a quick stop in for a nice chilly frappuccino on this hot afternoon started out a little bit strange when i was the next customer in line and an employee standing at an empty till caught my eye and smiled brightly i started to walk toward her and give her my order and the employee at the other till who had been helping the customer in front of me broke off to reprimand me for trying to cut in front of that customer i felt quite taken aback at the intensity of his response to what was obviously a misunderstanding i could barely even get out the words i m so sorry i thought she was asking me to come up and order when it was my turn for real and not for pretend it became apparent that she was a brand new employee being trained and thus it was no surprise that it was a slightly confusing process to get my card reloaded my items run in and finally paid for no big deal in itself we have all been learners at something at some point in our lives perhaps this brand new employee also learned that it sends a mixed message to customers waiting in line when you make eye contact and smile at them but you are totally not ready for them to actually come up and order however when i picked up my drink it had not been marked correctly so it wasn t quite right however it was close so i just took it and left i clearly needed to consume some of that caffeine before trying to wrap my brain around any more confusion

i was originally going to keep this short sweet you know an espresso with lumps of sugar and stars then i got to thinking about starbucks they were the originators of the chain specialty coffee shops they have grown by leaps and bounds and managed to make money they are a fortune company that has stayed independent with out being franchised new opportunities are available for having a starbucks inside a business hotel or hospital i think starbucks is grossly overpriced why do i say that if i order an espresso in a fine dining restaurant i pay that and more i am unusual in the fact that i love coffee good strong colombian coffee period i make that at home so i do not see the sense in buying it out i also have an espresso machine i am not into lattes or cappuccino s they have a new line of hot chocolates that are sure to be a hit i have had the opportunity to try many of their sandwiches which come into the starbucks already made the ones i have had are very good i also love their breads the multi grain berry bread with egg salad is exceptional their muffins are wonderful but they re still overpriced

i don t add cream to my coffee so logically i do not want my starbucks barista to prepare my coffee for me with the top third of the cup empty to make room for cream i learned quickly that people are encouraged to tell the baristas room for cream if they want it and no room for cream if they do not so that is what i continuously did and the baristas would nod and smile and it would seem that they were listening so it was awfully surprising when i d open my cup to put my equal in and see that they have graciously made room for cream gah the first few times this happened i was willing to let it go i m not one to rock the boat and at the times i d be visiting this starbucks it was always five minutes before i was starting work for the day so i wasn t really interested in waiting some more additionally i don t think i have much drive in me prior to my first cup of coffee of the day to even formulate a good conversation so it was all for naught really however one day i finally had enough ever the optimist and coupled with a naivete that somehow didn t get squashed while growing up in new york i ordered my coffee with no room for cream and a ready for cream cup was returned to me i gave the cup back to the barista after my discovery and asked her to please fill it up she told me i had to wait in line again to order i got a little feisty and told her that was a page in the unfair book that i had highlighted and earmarked and that it doesn t take a lot for her to please just take the large container of coffee located just to her left and use the next three seconds of her life to put it in my cup she then rolled her eyes and made some remark to a fellow employee that people like me are the reason she wants to quit the coffee business forever i couldn t contain myself and proceeded to laugh at her i mean it s just a lot of headache to simply procure a coffee i gave the situation some thought for awhile afterwards and my conclusion is that there is absolutely nothing so great about anything starbucks has available that i would be so terribly lost without it and have to return i can get better tasting coffee anywhere in the city even right next door and i can get better pastries elsewhere and so on though i guess i am a little sad that i won t be able to buy those weird cd compilations starbucks sells off of their record label or whatever the deal is with that sarcasm meter on

i m actually an employee at this particular starbucks and just wanted to shed some light on some of the reviews and comments and concerns of our fellow customers mobile orders i want to start off with our mobile ordering system now typically with this of course it is meant to be quicker and your order is meant to be ready at your time of arrival im aware that the app gives you a time in which your order should be done ignore this it is not accurate and doesn t account for the large volume of mobile order drinks that we receive at one time majority of the time mobile orders come though at one time we are the busiest in all of tampa so sometimes there will be a wait we most days receive enough at one time to stretch to our drive they window yikes i know but trust your barista is busting their butt to assure we get your order our to you asap if your order is missing it is because you have not hit the very last button that finalizes your order and sends it to our location if not it may be an error with our machine and simply letting your barista know at the bar that your order is missing we will be more than happy to make your drink on the fly it s never a problem our baristas bust their butt daily to assure you all are taken care of the best way we can bathrooms secondly i noticed a review saying we lock our bathrooms we do not lock the bathrooms if the bathroom is locked that simply means it is currently occupied reusable cups while we do fill reusable cups there is a standard in which drinks need to be made if you have a sparkly reusable cup it will not have the line measurements we need by standard to make sure we are giving you the proper proportions to build your beverage while some are upset that we still use a cup other than your own to build the beverage customers in drive thru expect there beverage to be ready upon arrival at the window if our line is wrapped around the building and we have to wait for you to come to the window take your cup and then make your drink it not only will hold up the line but will make you getting your beverage a longer process coffee during the morning we have all three coffees brewed we have pike which is our everyday blend our dark roast which we switch every so often with a new flavor and our blonde roast obviously during the early morning hours demand for brewed coffee is much higher therefore having all three coffees brewed is necessary at eleven is when we cut out the dark roast and the blonde because the demand for hot brewed coffee at that time isn t as high your barista will let you know if it is after that we no longer have blonde or dark and then ask if you would like our house blend of pike instead or wait about minutes for a fresh pourover of dark or blonde roast coffee we completely understand that we are a coffee shop therefore we should always have coffee but we have found that we waste tons of coffee brewing all three that aren t as popular during later in the afternoon than our house blend coffee why brew something hardly anyone is ordering which thus creates waste hope this has helped some if you have stopped coming to this location months ago i encourage you to give us another try as we are under new management

another starbucks typical drinks typical snacks typical decoration so what makes this one different from the rest i can point out pros and con pro location this is located on a busy corner of one of the busiest foot traffic streets in edmonton whyte ave also known as nd ave so the location makes this starbucks a great place to meet up with friends while enjoying an afternoon out and about another great aspect about the location is the ability to people watch whether you sit inside or at a table on the sidewalk this is a great location to soak in your surroundings pro i like the bar space set up inside this is something i haven t seen at any other starbucks just to the left of the barista brewing centre there is a bar with about stools set up it is fun to watch the barista s work behind the counter and i love the space available the round tables at typical starbucks are quite small if you are going there to do work but this particular bar is very wide which is ideal to spread out books and papers con i guess this is related to the first pro the fact that it is located on a busy street means lots of street noise from vehicles driving by and also can make it difficult to find parking hopefully this encourages people to take public transit but i know that option is not always feasible overall i do really like this starbucks especially in the summer while the city is abuzz with all of the festivals taking place

ah starbucks well once again brand recognition is in full force looking at the outside i could have been anywhere madrid penang sydney nope i was in st albert and the inside has the same cozy casual feel to it the store front faces west which is great for our area because that means they get the afternoon evening sun the service is good not great as sometimes you have to repeat your order or the staff feel the drive thru takes priority the food and beverages are exactly what is expected from a starbucks that s what you get from a standardized chain but i find this fact comforting because i know what i order will taste the same no matter where i am in the world i like that there are multiple plug in locations on the walls and underneath the bench seat this is great if you do need to work for a long period of time because then you don t have to fight other people for the limited power there are starbucks locations in st albert and this is by far my favorite for some reason even for how out of the box the store is i really like the feel of this one it is less busy then others the staff are always welcoming and the parking lot is very user friendly i love to meet up after dinner for coffee with friends throughout the year here

well if you are a fan of classic starbucks put hair on your chest strong coffee stay clear of this place the coffee is so weak it is indistinguishable from any other coffee shop i couldn t finish my coffee this morning and this is the third day in a row that this has happened i asked about whether they had changed their formala and i was told that the weaker coffee taste was probably due to the ligher roast they used the previous day i am not a new coffee drinker i know the difference between a lighter roast and weak coffee you can have a lighter roast that is strong and a dark roast that is weak the weakness in the coffee i was tasting was due to one of two things less coffee in the brew or very old stale coffee either way it made for a terrible cup of coffee if you like weak coffee this is the place for you the service is actually excellent and the atmosphere is wonderful i love the music they play and the patio is a pleasure to sit on if you want strong coffee though i would suggest ordering an extra shot of espresso in your coffee or go somewhere else where the coffee will be the same strength but cheaper

why review another starbucks well for simple reasons this store is unique for being a plush one and for being located inside an er hospital building which itself looks like a deluxe hotel yelp urges me to do a review possibly because i have posted a few pics and a tip go enjoy it s a beautiful full service store with one exception that it does not redeem your earned rewards although you can still earn stars for your purchases details you can skip while visiting a friend in reno he suggested that we should come to this starbucks i was totally surprised that he brought me to an er hospital building though which by any standard looks like a luxury hotel with large atriums waiting lounges with artistic sculptures flowers patios overlooking beautiful gardens i thought my friend was probably going there to visit a friend in the er but no he promptly brought me to this very stylish starbucks which had a very plush interior decor and a comfy outside seating area in a lobby overlooking the charming garden now i understood that my friend brought me here to show off their er hospital and this starbucks so we got in the long line for our brew and pastry the baristas were friendly and helpful they moved the line rather quickly with cash registers open we happily enjoyed the goodies in its charming lounge area i liked this place so much that i went back there the next days for more i liked its seating area in the lobby too at a table by the large picture window overlooking the small garden below however despite its appearance of a genuine big starbucks store it is only a licensed one by the starbucks franchise that means it cannot redeem your earned starbucks rewards nor give gold card members free refills although you can still earn stars for your purchases oh yes they have free parking in a parking structure across the tahoe tower wing july

great coffee but really questionable service on a recent trip there with my fiance i ordered a decaf mint tea i ve been getting decaf mint tea regularly from starbucks for roughly a decade but this time the barista one i d never seen here before insisted that starbucks doesn t have decaf tea i blinked wondering if i d been hallucinating over the past years then reminded myself that my drug days pretty much ended in the s and now my only vice is overpriced coffee served by pretentious hipsters i noted that i d often gotten decaf mint tea if not the other decaf option of passion fruit or something she repeated her mantra like a corporate robot adding that the teas i d mentioned are herbal not decaf it occurred to me that maybe while taking her starbucks training she d learned some distinction between herbal and decaf teas and the role caffeine plays or doesn t in both types and that my lack of that esoteric knowledge was seriously irritating to her i finally had to point to the drink she served me and say slowly does this have caffeine no she said great i said that s all i wanted to accomplish isn t safe to assume that the average customer who likely isn t a tea geek asking for decaf simply wants a beverage without caffeine did she really not know what i was talking about if i m going to buy overpriced beverages from people with hardware in their face and rainbow coiffed heads it d better be service with a f smile and pleasant attitude
